test.command: cd packages/mobile-tokens && bun test; cd packages/mobile-contracts && bun test; cd packages/mobile-gateway && bun test; cd apps/mobile && npx jest --maxWorkers=8

typecheck.command: cd packages/mobile-tokens && bun run tsc --noEmit; cd packages/mobile-contracts && bun run tsc --noEmit; cd packages/mobile-gateway && bun run tsc --noEmit; cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit

lint.command: echo 'No lint configured for new packages yet'

blockingIssues.description: tool_result event handler in apps/mobile/src/state/event-processor.ts (line 354) ignores SessionToolResultEventDTO.isError — always sets toolStatus to 'completed'. Failed tool executions cannot be represented correctly. Fix: use `event.isError ? 'error' : 'completed'` for toolStatus in both the update and push branches. ToolStatusDTO already supports 'error'. Update tests to cover tool error case.

nonBlockingIssues.description: text_complete overwrites existing completed intermediate assistant messages for the same turnId instead of creating a new message. Desktop semantics preserve intermediate (thinking) segments. Low risk for MVP but will cause parity divergence for conversations with intermediate assistant messages.

mobile-tokens imports DEFAULT_THEME via relative path from packages/shared without declaring @craft-agent/shared as a workspace dependency in package.json. Works due to monorepo hoisting but violates workspace dependency conventions and reduces portability.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Mobile app tests must live under src/__tests__/ (not colocated with source) because apps/mobile/tsconfig.json excludes src/__tests__/ from compilation. Colocated .test.ts files will cause tsc --noEmit failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features mobile-api-client and mobile-connection-state both encountered tsc failures from colocated tests. The api-client worker moved tests to src/__tests__/ to fix it. The connection-state worker placed tests at src/state/connection.test.ts (colocated) but tsconfig excludes were later broadened. Multiple reviewers flagged this inconsistency.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: New packages in the monorepo should declare workspace dependencies explicitly (e.g., @craft-agent/shared: 'workspace:*') rather than relying on relative path imports across package boundaries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mobile-tokens-package imports from packages/shared via relative path without declaring the dependency, bypassing workspace resolution. Flagged by reviewer for mobile-tokens-package.

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill mandates tests live under __tests__, but existing packages use colocated tests (src/index.test.ts).
rejectedObservations.reason: This is about bun test packages (contracts, tokens) which have no tsconfig exclusion issues. The __tests__ mandate is specifically relevant for the mobile app (Jest + tsc). The skill guidance is correct for the mobile app context but not applicable to bun test packages. No change needed — the distinction is already implicit.
